title: Coinbase Q4 Earnings Preview Analysis
text: Coinbase set to report Q4 and full-year 2024 earnings on February 13, 2025. Investors watched closely following underwhelming performance in Q3 2024 where company missed both earnings and revenue targets. Earnings per share came in at $0.28, falling short of $0.45 Wall Street projection. Revenue hit $1.21 billion versus $1.26 billion target. Company achieved seventh consecutive quarter of positive adjusted EBITDA. The regulatory environment has shifted favorably for cryptocurrency: Coinbase expanded into Argentina and registered with UK's Financial Conduct Authority. Pro-crypto leadership now leads the SEC following Gary Gensler's departure. Trump administration viewed as supportive of cryptocurrency sector growth. Current stock price at $266.90 sits below analyst targets averaging $295.68, with some projections reaching $400, suggesting potential upside of approximately 40% if results meet expectations. Major investors including Cathie Wood substantially reduced Coinbase holdings over past six quarters, which some analysts interpret as cautionary signal despite positive regulatory climate.
